title: vitex payos var. glabrescens
intro: Vitex payos var. glabrescens, also known as Glabrous Chastetree, is a variety of the Vitex payos plant, a flowering plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat menstrual disorders, anxiety, and insomnia, due to the presence of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Glabrous Chastetree include its potential to regulate menstrual cycles, reduce symptoms of menopause, and alleviate stress and anxiety. Glabrous Chastetree can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support women's health and well-being.
